description: Motorcycle riders must wear protective headgear while operating the vehicle.
punishment: Fine up to ₹1000 and possible licence suspension

description: Driving a vehicle while under the influence of alcohol exceeding the prescribed limit.
punishment: Fine up to ₹10,000 or imprisonment up to 6 months

description: Operating a motor vehicle without holding a valid driving license.
Public servant obtaining undue advantage or illegal gratification in exchange for official action.
Dishonestly taking movable property out of someone's possession without consent.
punishment: Up to 3 years imprisonment or fine or both

description: Punishment prescribed for committing theft.
punishment: Up to 3 years imprisonment or fine or both

description: Cheating and dishonestly inducing delivery of property.
punishment: Up to 7 years imprisonment and fine

description: Threatening another person with injury to body, reputation or property.
punishment: Up to 2 years imprisonment or fine

description: Causing bodily pain or injury intentionally.
punishment: Up to 1 year imprisonment or fine

description: Entering property unlawfully with criminal intent.
punishment: Up to 1 year imprisonment or fine

description: Unauthorized access to computer resources causing damage or data theft.
punishment: Up to 3 years imprisonment or fine up to ₹5 lakh

description: Fraudulent use of electronic signature, password or digital identity.
punishment: Up to 3 years imprisonment and fine

description: Cheating by personation using computer resources.
punishment: Up to 3 years imprisonment and fine

description: Guarantees freedom of speech and expression subject to reasonable restrictions.
Ensures equality before law and equal protection of laws.
Protection of life and personal liberty.

Causing damage to property intentionally or knowingly.
punishment: Up to 2 years imprisonment or fine or both

act: Prevention of Damage to Public Property Act
description: Destroying or damaging property owned by the government or public authority.
punishment: Up to 5 years imprisonment and fine

description: Causing damage to property intentionally or knowingly.
punishment: Up to 2 years imprisonment or fine or both
